changes.before: Jaina felt the number in the purse strap biting deeper into her shoulder. Triple passage meant counting out enough stamped gold to fill Dagny's palm twice over.
changes.after: She named a number that bit deeper into the purse strap on Jaina's shoulder.

changes.before: Route, vessel, destination, departure hour ... Harbor. Vessel. Destination. Departure hour. Nothing in it that could bring help.
changes.after: The relay message is handled once, then the prose moves on.

changes.before: Departure and harbor-loss were narrated in multiple consecutive beats with repeated object tracking.
changes.after: The harbor withdrawal now lands in one pass, keeping the cairn image and cutting repeated drift narration.

changes.before: Jaina felt it across skin and spell alike ...
changes.after: Tooth-ache. Pressure behind the eyes. The same wrongness the ward-stones had given her, only bigger now...

changes.before: Several paragraphs separately explained how Jaina, Dagny, and the crew learned to work together against the wind.
changes.after: The cooperation sequence is compressed into one lean operating rhythm.

changes.before: Cyndia appearing once from the hatch with a blanket around one of the younger rangers' shoulders, then vanishing below...
changes.after: Cyndia came up once with a blanket around one of the younger rangers' shoulders, then vanished below again.

changes.before: The bread-aversion exchange carried extra explanatory narration around refusal and apology.
changes.after: The refusal now lands in fewer beats while keeping the Stratholme contamination association.

changes.before: Jaina's recoil, fall, argument, and recovery sprawled across multiple reiterative beats.
changes.after: The collapse now hits fast, Sylvanas's intervention lands harder, and the recovery keeps only the necessary counts.

changes.before: She saw Sylvanas's hand on the ladder rung again and heard the flat no over the deck noise.
changes.after: Sylvanas's hand on the ladder rung. The flat no over deck noise.

changes.before: The abandoned bay evidence was presented in two overlapping passes before landfall.
changes.after: The burned hulls, new pilings, and frozen boot-ruts now establish abandonment once, then hand off to pursuit.

observations: Wordcount cut from 5131 to 3869, a reduction of 1262 words (24.6%).
Opening harbor description was tightened into a single anchored visual sweep.
Harbor-cold and sea-cold contrast was kept because it grounds POV rather than padding it.
Dagny's introduction now lands with fewer biography beats and cleaner authority.
The purse-cost reaction was cut from two explanatory sentences to one concrete hit.
Horse-separation remains because the chapter needs the shift from land pursuit to ship pursuit.
Relay-cylinder logistics lost a duplicate restatement pass.
The sending-stone beat now carries temptation without a second explanatory loop.
Shipboard grounding was preserved, but repetitive deck-adjustment prose was cut.
Harbor departure lost redundant object tracking while keeping the cairn as the last shore image.
The unnatural headwind reveal now arrives faster and from inside Jaina's body.
Magic-probe backlash remains because it establishes why brute force will fail at sea.
The Dagny/Jaina working rhythm was compressed into an operational montage.
Sea-labor detail was kept where it differentiated sailors, footing, and weather pressure.
Dagny's tea scene stayed because it sharpens command hierarchy and working method.
Sylvanas/Jaina banter was kept but stripped of extra cushioning narration.
The stern-assist sequence was reduced to the ship-motion logic and one grudging gain.
Bread-trigger revulsion stayed because Stratholme must remain physically present in Jaina.
The collapse scene was tightened to protect pace while keeping the care beat.
Sylvanas's 'pay for everything in blood' line remains the chapter's sharpest corrective and was preserved intact.
Below-deck recovery was compressed, but broth, Cyndia's dry humor, and certainty-reflection all remained.
Northrend arrival lost duplicate pressure description and now turns faster toward ice and coastline.
The abandoned bay evidence was consolidated so the chapter ends on pursuit, not inventory.
Dialogue-register audit found zero institutional or clinical contamination in quoted speech after the pass.
Remaining comparison words are literal or load-bearing; none read as fake-simplification or memo-register speech.
